schedule_ops.description: Scheduled task operation requests. Use an empty array when schedules should not change.

match.description: Natural-language selector for update/remove/pause/resume/run_now when job_id is unknown.

prompt.description: Self-contained scheduled task prompt for create/update. Empty string when unchanged.

schedule_spec.description: Decomposed schedule. Do not use natural phrases. For no schedule change, use kind unchanged with empty run_at/duration/cron.

kind.description: once_at: one-shot ISO timestamp; once_in: one-shot duration; interval: recurring duration; cron: recurring 5-field cron; unchanged: no schedule change for update/remove/pause/resume/list/run_now.

run_at.description: ISO timestamp for once_at, e.g. 2026-04-29T09:00:00. Empty string for other kinds. Naive timestamps use the scheduling timezone.

duration.description: Duration for once_in or interval, e.g. 30m, 2h, or 1d. Empty string for other kinds.

cron.description: 5-field cron for cron kind, e.g. 0 9 * * * for every day at 09:00. Empty string for other kinds.

repeat.description: Positive repeat count, or null for default/infinite depending on schedule kind.

skills.description: Skill names to attach to a new job. Use [] for prompt-only jobs.
